caveats: EDGE-CASE (LOW): server.py:1573-1577 — `backup` calls `tar.add(DATA_DIR, ...)` with no existence/type guard. If DATA_DIR does not yet exist as a directory (fresh deploy before any `save_hub`/`save_bookmarks` write), `tarfile.add` raises `FileNotFoundError`, surfacing an uncaught 500 to the authenticated admin. DATA_DIR is created lazily only by `save_hub` (line 862) / `BOOKMARKS_FILE.parent.mkdir` (line 87), not by `load_hub`/`get_hub_repos`. Fix: wrap in try/except returning a clean 500 with a
INFO: server.py:1575 — backup builds the entire tar.gz in memory (BytesIO). DATA_DIR is small in practice; acceptable. No change required.
